换句话说，模型的局限性厂家最清楚，它可以完全按照模型的特性设计不同的harness，然后打包卖给你。

First part of my life, I tried to please absolutely everyone, and doing that lost myself temporarily. 
Then I found AI, my true passion, something I was good at and loved (and still love doing). Most of those connections vanished. I stopped pleasing people and started doing what

"AI art is art" has become a rallying cry for my tribe. 

Every time I post it, I connect with people who are looking for AI community. I do get backlash too, but it's a price I'm willing to pay to meet more likeminded people.
